To live well means to live in harmony with nature. The “nature” here is not merely the Earth but the whole of the universe, a vast web of relationships that has been called the “universe of life.” The “living universe” is a world of interdependence and harmony, where the diverse life forms have a common destiny.
The living universe is a great creative force. It is a world of transformation, where the individual is not only a part of the whole, but also the source of its renewal.
